name: CTID ATT&CK → Microsoft 365 Security Capabilities Mapping
owner: Center for Threat-Informed Defense (CTID) — MITRE Engenuity
description: Mapping of MITRE ATT&CK 14.1 Enterprise techniques to Microsoft 365 security service capabilities. Unusually granular per-capability files (Defender for Endpoint, Identity Protection, etc.) that enable licensing-tier (E3 vs E5) coverage analysis. Snapshot 2023-12-11.
relationToCloudSecurity: Canonical reference for M365 platform threat-informed defense; commonly cited in CASB/SSE evaluations.

lifecycle.notes: Snapshot. Largest CTID mapping set due to per-capability granularity.

current_extraction.notes: 35+ per-capability JSON files in this directory.
